render_data.prompt: Place each item into the Mass or Weight column.

image_prompt: SVG: space-probe simulation scene over a curved orange planet limb in starry space; vertical 'Metres' scale (0,20,40,60,80,100), a space probe at 0 m on the surface, a 'time / s — Mars: 7.3 s' readout box, and planet-selector buttons Mercury, Venus, Mars, Earth.

render_data.title: Space probe: drop a test object 100.0 m

image_prompt: SVG: two starry panels — left shows a crescent Moon orbiting a small blue Earth with a dashed orbit arc ('Moon orbiting the Earth'); right shows a mostly-lit gibbous Moon with craters as seen from Earth over a month.

render_data.title: The Moon orbiting the Earth over a month
render_data.caption: Gravity keeps the Moon in orbit; different lit fractions are seen from Earth.

image_prompt: SVG: two circuit diagrams using standard symbols (cell, open switch, filament bulb ⊗, ammeter Ⓐ). 'Incorrect' has the ammeter on a parallel branch off the bulb (not in series). 'Correct' has the ammeter in series with the bulb in the single loop.

SVG: clean ruled table of radiation absorption by body tissue. Columns ultraviolet, X-rays, gamma rays; rows absorption by skin (high, low, low), absorption by bones (high, high, low), absorption by soft tissue (high, medium, low).
